title: Eon
description: Eon synthesizes health data — sleep, steps, heart rate, and qualitative notes — into a single predictive view. Built around a custom wearable and an app designed as the foundational OS for personal health.

title: Lionfish Pavilion
description: A small pavilion for Southern California's coastal landscape. Bamboo slat walls enclose the lower volume while steel A-frames support glass panels that open the upper to sky.

title: SEP
description: President of USC's flagship startup club. Oversaw a 7-team incubator each semester alongside full club operations: recruitment, fundraising, programming, and external relationships. All-time high applications and Demo Day attendance, both semesters.

title: Bohnett Board
description: One of 10 students stewarding the David Bohnett Foundation's annual $40k philanthropic fund. Modeled L.A. social issues by dollar leverage, then pitched and executed a reallocation from homelessness (the board's decade-long default) to education and health.

title: SoundCloud Stacks
description: A reimagined "Behind this track" feature for SoundCloud. Stacks are interactive, collapsible visualizations that let musicians reveal the layers and decisions behind their music

title: Laced Up
description: A sneaker-shaped bike rack designed at age 11 for a citywide competition. Won, fabricated, and installed in downtown Los Altos.

title: Algaeorithm
description: A computational biology platform and education tool for high school classrooms. Developed in collaboration with the Institute for Systems Biology and funded by $20k in grants from the U.S. Department of Energy. Full product, brand, and content system designed from scratch.
